basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Walkin Project Technician III/ Nurse Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.short_information: The Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has officially announced the Project Technician III/ Nurse Recruitment 2026 for 1 contract based vacancy. Candidates with a 12th Science qualification and relevant diploma with experience, or a graduate degree in a relevant field with experience, are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can participate in the walk-in interview scheduled for 02 July 2026. Check the official notification for detailed eligibility criteria, age limit, salary, selection process, and interview venue below

qualification.education_qualification: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/ DMLT / Engineering or equivalent)
qualification.details: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/ DMLT / Engineering or equivalent) + Five Years Experience in relevant subject / field or Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + two years' experience in relevant subject Working knowledge of MS Office, MS Word, MS PowerPoint Experience in field work and data collection Proficiency in speaking, writing and reading Tamil and English

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Technician III/ Nurse Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JIPMER Project Technician III/ Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

JIPMER Project Technician III/ Nurse Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/ DMLT / Engineering or equivalent) + Five Years Experience in relevant subject / field or Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + two years' experience in relevant subject Working knowledge of MS Office, MS Word, MS PowerPoint Experience in field work and data collection Proficiency in speaking, writing and reading Tamil and English

JIPMER Project Technician III/ Nurse Age Limit 2026
JIPMER Project Technician III/ Nurse Salary 2026
JIPMER Project Technician III/ Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
JIPMER Project Technician III/ Nurse Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for JIPMER Project Technician- III/ Nurse Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Technician III/ Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for JIPMER Project Technician- III/ Nurse posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the JIPMER Project Technician- III/ Nurse posts is scheduled for 02 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Technician- III/ Nurse position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 20,000/- plus 20% HRA, totaling approximately Rs. 24,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have passed 12th in Science with a Diploma in MLT/ DMLT or Engineering, along with five years of relevant experience, or a three-year Graduate degree with two years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q6. How should candidates apply for the JIPMER Project Technician- III/ Nurse recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Eligible candidates need to attend the interview at the specified venue with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Technician- III/ Nurse post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the JIPMER recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for JIPMER, located in Puducherry.

faq.question: Q10. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.
